q: Describe a positive change you have made recently in your daily routine
cue_card: And explain why it is a positive change
examiner_note: Hãy tập trung vào việc mô tả chi tiết positive change you have made recently in your daily routine.

samples.band7: Well, I'd like to talk about describe a positive change you have made recently in your daily routine. It's something I've been interested in for a while. For example, I think it's very important because it helps people relax and learn new things.
samples.band8: Actually, I've always found describe a positive change you have made recently in your daily routine to be quite a fascinating subject. From my perspective, it offers a lot of benefits such as improving our mental health and broadening our horizons. I really enjoy exploring this topic further.
